import React from 'react' import products from '../products' import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import { Col, Row } from 'react-bootstrap' const ProductScreen = () => { const { id } = useParams() const product = products.find((p) => p._id === id) return ( <> Go Back

{product.name}

{product.description}

${product.price.toFixed(2)}

 ) } export default ProductScreen
